In re_viewer::external::re_chunk_store::external::arrow::compute::kernels::aggregate

re_viewer::external::re_chunk_store::external::arrow::compute::kernels::aggregate

Function min_binary_view

pub fn min_binary_view(
    array: &GenericByteViewArray<BinaryViewType>,
) -> Option<&[u8]>
Expand description

Returns the minimum value in the binary view array, according to the natural order.
